interactionPlan.concept: Lateral camera translation affects the observed motion in the image plane with depth-dependent motion fields.

interactions.label: Camera Speed
interactions.teaches: Allows observation of how increased speed affects the motion field and the apparent velocity of objects in the image plane.

interactions.label: Camera Translation
interactions.teaches: Demonstrates parallax by allowing the user to move the camera laterally, visualizing the different velocities of objects based on depth.

interactions.label: Show Motion Vectors
interactions.teaches: Displays the direction and magnitude of motion vectors, helping to understand how lateral motion appears in the image plane.

interactions.label: Toggle Depth Layers
interactions.teaches: Increments through depth layers of the scene to highlight the correlation between object depth and their apparent motion.

interactionPlan.camera_suggestion: Start with a viewpoint looking perpendicular to the direction of lateral motion to emphasize the side-scrolling effect.
interactionPlan.notes: Ensure that depth cues are clear; differentiate objects by size or color to aid in depth perception.

gpt-4o.notes: The 3D version accurately captures the geometry, interactivity, labels, and concepts of the original image.
